title: Skills gap: add LLM/RAG eval-monitoring acceptance checklist
description: First action: create or extend `skills/ai-governance-readiness` with golden cases, retrieval/source checks, human-review routing, drift metrics, rollback, and client signoff criteria. Why it matters: production reliability, evaluation, monitoring, and governance are recurring JD requirements and client-risk controls. Done: a reusable checklist exists and is referenced by client automation/app handoff workflows.
